pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target properties are not updated to match the target environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.3.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages; Spring Boot 3.x is required for Java 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer needed or compatible.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation-api artifact is part of the old Java EE namespace; Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE uses jakarta.annotation, and the old artifact may cause conflicts or be unavailable.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.websocket-api with jakarta.websocket-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.websocket package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; code referencing it will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; servlet-based code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.mail/mail with jakarta.mail-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.mail package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; mail-related code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.
Spring Boot 3.x manages test dependencies differently; explicit exclusions for vintage engine may be unnecessary or conflict with the new test starter configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from mariadb-java-client to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Replace javax.el-api with jakarta.el-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.el package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+; EL-related code will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.* replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add <release> flag to maven-compiler-plugin to enforce Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not enforce the correct bytecode version or API usage for Java 21, potentially leading to runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace com.sun.xml.bind:jaxb-impl with org.glassfish.jaxb:jaxb-runtime for Jakarta EE compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old JAXB implementation uses javax.* packages; the new runtime uses jakarta.* packages, which are required for Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to a newer version compatible with the build environment.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a newer version compatible with the build environment.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 21 bytecode, leading to instrumentation failures.
